concerts.label: La Primerisima: First Spanish Festival of Song

about_quotes.speaker: Candido Camero
about_quotes.evidence: The person that sang in that septet is somone who was also famous here in the United States, Vicentico Valdés, and I was the tres player.
about_quotes.doc_title: Candido Camero — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Palmieri
about_quotes.evidence: I started working the Palladium in 1956 with Vicentico Valdés... I stayed with Vicentico for two years... I played with him in 1956, and I stayed with him... played in the Palladium again with Vicentico.
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Palmieri — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
